Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}It'll be a full moon again in just another week.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Finally, this will be the twelfth ordeal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I can't tell if time's been at a crawl or flying on by, but either way, a lot's happened, hasn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}It's a bit soon to be reminiscing, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}How about I come see you once it's over?[n]{f 1 1}
